taxon.author: Simon,
taxon.distribution: Southeast Asia. Introduced to USA to Panama, Caribbean, Venezuela, Brazil, Galapagos, Ascension, Cape Verde, Canary Is., Middle East, Japan (Ryukyu and Ogasawara Is.), Pacific Is.

referenceObject.reference: Simon, E. (1892e). On the spiders of the island of St. Vincent. Part 1. Proceedings of the Zoological Society of London 59(4, 1891): 549-575, pl. 42.
